zh.Brixham, Torbay, Devon, England: 英國戴文托爾巴易布利哈姆
zh.Of, Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne de Bodrugan - Heiress of Nythway於1337年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan23歲，母親Isabel Whalesborough27歲。她於大約1356年與Sir John Cole在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1380年在英國戴文享年44歲。

zh-hans.Brixham, Torbay, Devon, England: 英国戴文托爾巴易布利哈姆
zh-hans.Of, Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne de Bodrugan - Heiress of Nythway于1337年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan23岁，母亲Isabel Whalesborough27岁。她于大约1356年与Sir John Cole在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1380年在英国戴文享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Nythway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bytheway
meanings: English (West Midlands): topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) road' (Middle English wei, Old English weg ‘road’).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne de Bodrugan - Heiress of Nythway was born in 1337, in Cornwall, England, her father, Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan, was 23 and her mother, Isabel Whalesborough, was 27. She married Sir John Cole about 1356, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1380, in Devon, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne de Bodrugan - Heiress of Nythway est née en 1337, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel Whalesborough, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Cole environ 1356, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1380, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne de Bodrugan - Heiress of Nythway 1337 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan 23 und ihre Mutter Isabel Whalesborough 27. Sie hat um 1356 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Sir John Cole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1380 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Bodrugan - Heiress of Nythway è nata il nel 1337 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Isabel Whalesborough, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Cole circa 1356, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1380, nel Devon, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne de Bodrugan - Heiress of Nythwayが1337年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas de Bodruganは23歳，母Isabel Whalesboroughは27歳であった。約1356年にイギリスイギリスデボンでSir John Coleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1380年にイギリスデボンで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne de Bodrugan - Heiress of Nythway(이)가 1337년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Whalesborough(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1356년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Sir John Cole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 영국 데폰에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Of, Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England: Kylgh, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Bodrugan - Heiress of Nythway nasceu em 1337, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Whalesborough, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Cole aproximadamente 1356, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1380, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne de Bodrugan - Heiress of Nythway родилась в 1337 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Whalesborough, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Cole около 1356 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1380 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne de Bodrugan - Heiress of Nythway nació en 1337, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas de Bodrugan, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabel Whalesborough, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir John Cole aproximadamente 1356, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1380, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
